text: Science reveals secrets about blocked practice limits that social media gets wrong. Blocked practice means repeating the same skill without variation. But, is that the best way to learn? Studies show that while blocked practice can build confidence, it doesn’t prepare you for real challenges. In contrast, varied practice—mixing skills—enhances retention and adaptability in real scenarios. So, while social media glorifies repetition, true mastery lies in embracing variety. Want to master your skills? Start mixing it up! Like and follow for more insights.
